_comment: Ship-upgrade verbs over StrategyState.Get().ShipUpgrades (Il2CppMenace.Strategy.ShipUpgrades). Bespoke ship verbs, if any, live in Strategy/Ship.cs.

verbs.name: EquippedUpgrade
verbs.summary: The upgrade template equipped in the given ship slot index, or null when empty.

verbs.name: EmptySlotCount
verbs.summary: How many ship-upgrade slots of the given type are empty.

verbs.name: FilledSlotCount
verbs.summary: How many ship-upgrade slots of the given type are filled.

verbs.name: SlotType
verbs.summary: The slot-type template for the given ship slot index.

verbs.name: SpentComponents
verbs.summary: The OCI components spent on ship-upgrade slots of the given type.

verbs.name: EquipUpgrade
verbs.summary: Equip an upgrade into a slot for the paid OCI components. Returns false when the game refuses.

verbs.name: UnequipUpgrade
verbs.summary: Unequip an equipped ship upgrade. Returns false when it is not equipped.
